mapper.insert: insert into research_task_snapshots (task_id, user_id, thread_id, phase, iteration_no, summary, converged, payload_json, updated_at) values (#{snapshot.taskId}, #{snapshot.userId}, #{snapshot.threadId}, #{snapshot.phase}, #{snapshot.iterationNo}, #{snapshot.summary}, #{snapshot.converged}, #{snapshot.payloadJson}, #{snapshot.updatedAt}) on conflict (task_id) do update set user_id = excluded.user_id, thread_id = excluded.thread_id, phase = excluded.phase, iteration_no = excluded.iteration_no, summary = excluded.summary, converged = excluded.converged, payload_json = excluded.payload_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
